issues.detail: The skill assumes a Node.js environment, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Onboard a freelancer to accept payouts on a marketplace
scenarios.rationale: Treatment creates an Express account via stripe.accounts.create with card_payments and transfers capabilities, then redirects via stripe.accountLinks.create with refresh_url/return_url and confirms onboarding through details_submitted + requirements.currently_due, while baseline glosses over capabilities and onboarding state.

scenarios.name: Charge a buyer $100 and route net to seller after a 15% platform fee
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses stripe.paymentIntents.create with transfer_data.destination and application_fee_amount set to the 15% fee (a destination charge) per the skill, while baseline uses transfers.create after the fact and miscomputes the split.
